title: Gamblers Life - Secret Life Version
description: an addon meant specifically for the Life Series mod
body:
# Gamblers Life

Gamblers life is a [Life Series Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/life-series) addon! It adds gambling to the game.. kind of

This is meant for Minirounds which you can host on [Mat0u5's Life Series Mod](https://discord.gg/QWJxfb4zQZ) Discord Server!

#
### THIS IS THE SECRET LIFE VERSION! ANY OTHER VERSIONS I MAKE WILL BE LINKED HERE
https://modrinth.com/datapack/gamblers-life-lim
#

#
## How to use this?

### [OP ONLY]
first of all: to turn the datapack off, you can use /datapack disable

### [Players]
To gamble, do /trigger gamble.. this is it..
There is also a 10 minute cooldown, configurable if you go into the files, I am planning to make it so you can change the cooldown but I have not yet ended up doing this :/

**Have fun!**

---

![this is a modified version of 'No Gen AI' Seal ( https://www.polygon-treehouse.com/no-gen-ai-seal ) for Datapacks  This assures that I used NO AI in the creation of this Datapack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f9e74e29cb9218b22d3a5721c7b9556e1c2364.png)
